title: BedHomes
body:
️️✨ BedHomes - Turn Beds into Teleportation Points! ️️✨
Tired of the classic /home system? Bring a more colorful and intuitive way to teleport around your world with BedHomes!
With this plugin, every bed becomes a unique teleportation point, using Minecraft’s 15 available bed colors.

![Bed Homes](https://landiacraft.com/img/bed_homes.png)

✨ Key Features
✅ Bed-based /home system
Placing a bed automatically registers it as a home location. Each bed color is treated as a different home.

✅ Up to 15 beds per player
Minecraft offers 15 bed colors — and BedHomes lets you use each one as an individual home point.

✅ Permission-based limits
bedhomes.home.1 → allows 1 active bed
bedhomes.home.2 → allows 2 active beds
...
bedhomes.home.15 → up to 15 beds!

✅ Interactive home GUI
Run /home to open an inventory menu displaying all your beds.
Click a bed to teleport instantly!

[Bed Homes GUI](https://landiacraft.com/img/bed_homes2.png)

✅ Database support
SQLite (default)
MySQL for advanced setups and networked servers
✅ Fully customizable messages
✅ PlaceholderAPI support

Commands
/home
Opens an interactive GUI with all your registered bed homes.

/beds
Displays plugin-related admin commands:
/beds help → Shows help menu
/beds reload → Reloads configuration
/beds version → Displays current plugin version
Requirements & Compatibility
Compatible with Paper, Spigot, and modern forks

Optional PlaceholderAPI support
Configuration
Easy-to-edit config.yml

Multi-language support

Simple MySQL connection setup
Example Usage
Place a red bed → Registers as Red Bed

Place a blue bed → Registers as Blue Bed

Place another red bed → Overwrites the previous red home

Run /home → GUI shows all registered beds for quick teleport
️ Permissions
Set per-player bed limits with these permissions:

bedhomes.home.1
bedhomes.home.2
bedhomes.home.3
...
bedhomes.home.15
Perfect for rank-based access or donor perks!

Why Choose BedHomes?
Unique, intuitive, and visual
Great for survival, RPG, or creative servers
⚙️ Easy to configure with powerful database options
Seamlessly integrates with existing systems via PlaceholderAPI

‍ Support & Feedback
Got a feature idea or found a bug?
Feel free to leave feedback or reach out via the support section!
Discord: [https://discord.gg/Sx2d3JVf](https://discord.gg/fnS7WAErsh)
BedHomes makes teleportation more immersive, intuitive, and fun.
Bring a touch of color to your server’s travel system! ️✨
